vocab.vi: to you all; you (plural, indirect object)

vocab.pittura la bassa: Pittura la Bassa (proper name; likely a channel or person)
vocab.che parlava di: that talked about; that was about
vocab.da un punto di vista: from a point of view; from the perspective
vocab.nessun tipo di: no kind of; any kind of

vocab.cogliere l'occasione: take the opportunity; seize the opportunity
vocab.parlerò: I will talk; I will speak

vocab.bisognerebbe: one should; it would be necessary

vocab.andate a farvi un giro: go take a look; go check out

vocab.conto che: I realize that; I notice that
vocab.un dato: a piece of information; a fact
vocab.che è però quello fondamentale: which is however the fundamental one

vocab.andare a: to go to; to be about to (construction)
vocab.sto andando a: I am going to; I am about to

vocab.fresco: fresh (note: here, 'da fresco' means 'when fresh' or 'from a rested state')

vocab.una sospensione e l'altra: one hang and the other; each hang

vocab.chi ci viene fornito: what is given to us; what we are provided with

vocab.da sette secondi: of seven seconds; for seven seconds

vocab.una sospensione e l'altra: one pause and another; between pauses

vocab.un po' più: a bit more; a little more
vocab.dare un'indicazione: to give an instruction; to give a guideline

vocab.l'ultima siri: the last set (note: 'siri' is likely a typo for 'serie')
vocab.non dovremmo riuscire a: we should not be able to

vocab.non dobbiamo: we must not; we don't have to
vocab.ce lo hanno detto: they told us (lit. they have told it to us)

vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to succeed in
vocab.chiuderla: to close it; to finish it

vocab.avrei potuto: I could have; I would have been able to
vocab.dovrò: I will have to; I must

vocab.con una certa frequenza: with a certain frequency; fairly often

vocab.gli fa: he/she does for them; it does for them
vocab.all'ultima: at the last; to the last

vocab.ci dobbiamo fare: we have to do (note: 'fare' here means 'to do')
vocab.siamo completamente morti: we are completely dead (note: idiom for 'exhausted')
vocab.non ce la facciamo: we can't do it; we can't make it

vocab.andremo a: we will (go to); we are going to

vocab.ci consente di: allows us to; enables us to

vocab.andare a: to go to; to proceed to

vocab.andremo a: we will go to; we will (future construction)

vocab.questo discorso vale per: this applies to; this is valid for

vocab.si dovrà: one will have to; it will be necessary to
vocab.i dati: the results; the data (note: 'dati' literally means 'data', but here refers to 'results')

vocab.stiamo andando a: we are going to; we are about to
vocab.non dobbiamo: we must not; we should not
vocab.dobbiamo andare a: we must go to; we must
vocab.schiacciandole: pressing them; squeezing them (refers to the shoulder blades)

vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so as to
vocab.vi renderete conto: you will realize; you will notice

vocab.in blocco articolare: in joint lock (note: refers to fully locked/straightened joints)

vocab.l'udeur: the udeur (unclear; possibly a specific term or acronym)

vocab.eseguiranno: they will perform; they will execute

vocab.dovrà essere svolto: must be performed; must be done (future, passive)

vocab.un quarto d'ora: a quarter of an hour (15 minutes)

vocab.lista: list; rung (of a ladder) (note: in gym context, 'lista' can mean 'rung')

vocab.andiamo a: let's go to; we are going to

vocab.semi arcuate: semi-arched; slightly curved (note: refers to finger position)
vocab.sospensione: suspension (note: refers to holding or hanging)

vocab.andremo a: we will; we are going to

vocab.andare a: go to; start to; proceed to
vocab.stiamo andando a: we are going to; we are about to
vocab.da tre secondi: of three seconds; for three seconds

vocab.stiamo andando a: we are going to; we are about to
vocab.il 369: the 369 (refers to a specific method or set)

vocab.l'udeur: the effort (note: likely a typo for 'l'ardore' or 'l'ardeur', meaning 'effort' or 'ardor')
vocab.andare ad aumentare: go to increase; aim to increase
vocab.passiamo allora a: let's move on to; we now move to

vocab.ci servono: we need; they are useful to us
vocab.per quanto: as far as; regarding (note: often introduces a clause)

vocab.andremo a eseguire: we will perform; we are going to do

vocab.ti resta: you have left; remain for you
vocab.andare a: go to; going to (construction for near future)

vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to succeed in

vocab.andiamo a: let's go to; we are going to (construction for 'let's do')

vocab.dovremo: we will have to; we must

vocab.andare a: go to; start to (used before a verb to indicate beginning an action)

vocab.passiamo: let's move on; we move on
vocab.da freschi: when fresh; while fresh (context: not tired)

vocab.andremo: we will go; we will move (future tense of 'andare')

vocab.bello completo: nice and complete; full (rest) (note: 'bello' here intensifies 'completo')
vocab.di non arrivare a cedimento: not to reach failure (note: 'cedimento' refers to muscle failure in exercise)

vocab.tale da: such as to; so as to

vocab.aumenterai: you will increase (note: should be 'aumenterà' for 'it will increase')
vocab.dovremmo: we should; we will have to
vocab.una piccola zaborra: a small ballast; a little extra weight

vocab.alla volta: at a time; one at a time
vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so as to
vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to succeed in

vocab.nelle: in the; within the (in + le, feminine plural)
vocab.non occorre: it is not necessary; not needed
vocab.definitiva: definitive; final (here, possibly a filler or misplacement)

vocab.radicata: rooted (possibly a mishearing or typo; could mean 'rooted' or 'well-established')
vocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other
